title: xiigen.i18n-translation.policy-denied.v1
description: Terminal event emitted when T669 TranslationPolicyGate denies the requested locale. T666 returns { fallback: true, locale: 'en' } to the HTTP client (CF-812: endpoint never returns 4xx/5xx). No translation is produced and no ref is written.

tenantId.description: Tenant whose policy denied the request (ALS).

fallbackUsed.description: Always true on this event — marker that the English fallback path (CF-812) was taken.

reason.description: Policy denial reason surfaced to observability, e.g. 'locale_not_enabled'.
